text:
- update from 7.0.5 to 7.1.1
- no run-time testing performed; but it installs on 7.2-RELEASE tinderbox

* Note: there have been many releases during the interim, so perhaps there is a damn good(tm) reason the port has not been updated to reflect upstream.  I apologize for my ignorance if that is the case.
